channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Where retirees should and shouldn't keep $20,000 right now
item.description: Not all savings accounts are ideal for retirees protecting $20,000 today. Two options stand out.

item.title: South Dakota GOP governor primary heads to runoff after bitter race
item.description: Businessman Toby Doeden and incumbent Gov. Larry Rhoden will compete in a runoff for the GOP nomination.

item.title: California bank hostage situation ends with suspect shot dead
item.description: The suspect was pronounced dead at the scene early Wednesday, according to Bakersfield police.

item.title: Senate advances reconciliation bill, drops ballroom funding
item.description: Senate Republicans are moving forward with a package to fund DHS immigration agencies on Wednesday.
